metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins and supporting CLIs

plugins.name: imdb
plugins.description: IMDB movie and TV data. Search films, look up cast and box office, browse Top 250 movies/shows, and check upcoming releases. Commands: /imdb, /imdb:movie, /imdb:person, /imdb:top

plugins.name: dream-team
plugins.description: Avatar framework and marketplace — create, recruit, consult, review, plan, and coach with AI expert agents. Ships with 21 curated avatars and 10 composable conversation patterns (map-reduce, debate, reflection, sequential, supervisor, hierarchical, blackboard, voting, round-robin, MoE routing) with an adaptive router that selects and switches patterns dynamically.

plugins.name: document
plugins.description: Document type system — define document types and generate per-type management skills with lifecycle, relationships, and CRUD operations

plugins.name: copilot-money
plugins.description: Personal finance data from Copilot Money. Check account balances, search transactions, view budget vs actuals, track spending patterns, and analyze cash flow. Commands: /copilot-money, /copilot-money:transactions, /copilot-money:budget, /copilot-money:summary, /copilot-money:status
